reforms.description: The Széchenyi plan is introduced as a cornerstone of the government's economic policy, focusing on public investment and support for small and medium enterprises, with an estimated spending equal to 2.5% of GDP. It includes a public spending initiative aimed at promoting domestic R&D and innovation, alongside infrastructure development.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The plan aims to enhance the innovation capacity of SMEs, which is expected to raise productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan has been officially announced as part of the government's economic policy.
reforms.importance_rationale: The Széchenyi plan represents a significant structural change in the support for innovation and R&D in Hungary.
reforms.source_quote: The programme... takes, as a starting point, the notion that Hungary is a dual economy consisting of two separate sub-systems without significant production or labour market linkages.

reforms.description: The government initiated steps to restructure the science system, focusing on enhancing cross-disciplinary research and improving linkages with industry, although no concrete actions have been taken yet.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The impact of the restructuring efforts is uncertain as no concrete actions have been implemented yet.
reforms.status_evidence: The steps have been initiated but no concrete actions have been taken.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant but not major reform in the science system.
reforms.source_quote: Some tentative steps are being made to improve linkages but more needs to be done.

reforms.description: The Ministry of Health has created a special healthcare policy and research institute to perform technology assessments and related research, establishing linkages with international organizations and networks.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of the institute is expected to enhance healthcare research capabilities and improve health outcomes.
reforms.status_evidence: The institute has been created and is operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The creation of the institute represents a significant step in enhancing healthcare research infrastructure.
reforms.source_quote: The Ministry of Health has created a special healthcare policy and research institute, which is to perform technology assessments and related research.

reforms.description: The Ministry of Health has initiated a managed care pilot project to evaluate new healthcare delivery systems, which has been extended due to positive initial results.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The pilot project aims to improve healthcare delivery, which can lead to better health outcomes and efficiency in the healthcare system.
reforms.status_evidence: The pilot project has been initiated and extended based on positive results.
reforms.importance_rationale: The pilot project represents a minor reform in healthcare delivery systems.
reforms.source_quote: The HIFA set up a managed care (MC) pilot project in 1999... it has been twice extended and now has funding until the end of 2000.
